members.label: ceiling light
members.description: small round ceiling detector/fixture on sloped ceiling
members.long_form_open_description: Small circular white fixture (likely a smoke detector or recessed-type light) located near the apex of the sloped ceiling above the stair landing; flush-mounted and unobtrusive.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted high on the sloped ceiling above the stairs and roughly centered horizontally in the image
